# cogsci-skilllib

Standards-first cognitive-science agent skills scaffold.

## What this repository is for

A ClawBio-style but cognitive-science-native repository for:
- behavioral task generation
- standards-compliant data organization
- event annotation
- Bayesian and drift-diffusion modeling
- reproducibility bundles
- agent-readable repository structure

## Read first

- /README.md
- /MASTER_PLAN.md
- /VISION.md
- /METHODS_POLICY.md
- /ROADMAP.md
- /AGENTS.md
- /docs/standards-stack.md
- /docs/architecture.md
- /docs/codex-playbook.md

## Important directories

- /skills/
- /templates/
- /schemas/
- /examples/
- /benchmarks/
- /scripts/
- /.github/

## Source-of-truth policy

Use `/skills/catalog.json` as the source of truth for public skill listings.
Regenerate docs with:

`python scripts/render_skill_catalog.py`

## Notes for coding agents

Do not treat placeholder scaffolding as finished capability.
Do not claim support for a standard unless a validation path exists.
Prefer a narrow, complete vertical slice over broad but shallow implementation.
